subject: Size limits in Cube?
body:
Hi all,

I'm working on processing the EMPIAR-10499 dataset to set up/test our 
Warp-Relion-M pathway. I have some tomograms that I've reconstructed at 
5Å/pix, and I'm trying to open it up in Cube so I can double check the 
coordinates of some subtomograms (also reconstructed at 5Å/pix). However, 
when I try to open the tomogram in Cube, nothing happens; the screen 
remains blank (it looks exactly like it does when you first open Cube, 
except the name of the tomogram is in the upper left hand corner). I know 
the tomogram is okay, since I can open it with 3dmod and it looks fine. 
Cube is also working fine, because I can open and work with tomograms at 
10Å/pix. Is there some sort of size limit that Cube is coming up against, 
or might there be something wrong with my 5Å data? Thank you in advance for 
any help!

Thanks,
Jessica
Postdoctoral Associate | The Scripps Research Institute
